final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original illustration of a dreamy fairy-tale underwater world featuring a mermaid gliding through coral reefs.

Style/medium: digital illustration, fairy-tale storybook style with painterly brushwork, soft dreamlike rendering reminiscent of Lorelay Bove concept art
Composition: wide mid-depth underwater scene, gentle diagonal light rays descending from the surface, mermaid positioned center-left amid coral formations, sunken shipwreck treasure in the lower-right background
Subject: graceful mermaid with flowing hair and iridescent tail weaving between vibrant coral reefs; glowing bioluminescent jellyfish drifting around her; scattered treasure chest and gold coins spilling from a mossy sunken shipwreck
Scene/backdrop: deep ocean interior, coral reef ecosystem with layered depth, distant dark blue abyss fading behind the scene
Lighting/mood: warm golden light shafts piercing down from the ocean surface, mixing with cool deep-sea blue; soft bioluminescent glow from jellyfish; magical, wonder-filled, dreamlike atmosphere
Color palette: deep sapphire and teal as the dominant base, warm golden light shafts as contrast, vivid coral pinks and purples as mid-ground accents, soft aquamarine glow from jellyfish
Materials/textures: translucent jellyfish membranes with inner glow, iridescent fish-scale texture on mermaid tail, barnacle-encrusted ship timbers, soft coral polyp surfaces
Avoid: photorealistic rendering, dark horror aesthetic, anatomically clinical depiction, watermark, generic anime flat style
